options.name: --environment
options.description: The name of the environment to run the command in. Overrules the active environment set in .confixrc

options.name: --git-username
options.description: The username used for git authentication.

options.name: --git-token
options.description: The token used for git authentication.

commands.name: component
commands.description: This command is used to manage components.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Adds a component to the project

commands.name: build
commands.description: builds a component. Runs all configured component inputs

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initializes a component and creates a component file

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists the component of the project

options.name: --environment
options.description: The name of the environment to run the command in. Overrules the active environment set in .confixrc

options.name: --only-components
options.description: If you specify this option, only the components will be built.

commands.name: config
commands.description: This command is used to manage config.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists the configuration to a file

commands.name: set
commands.description: Sets a configuration value in the nearest .confixrc

arguments.name: PATH
arguments.description: The path to the configuration file

arguments.name: VALUE
arguments.description: The value to set as json

commands.name: show
commands.description: Shows the configuration to a file

commands.name: decrypt
commands.description: Decrypts a file using the configured provider

options.name: --environment
options.description: The name of the environment to run the command in. Overrules the active environment set in .confixrc

arguments.name: INPUT_FILE
arguments.description: The path to the file to encrypt or decrypt.

arguments.name: OUT_FILE
arguments.description:
The file to write the encrypted or decrypted data to.
If not provided the input file will be overwritten.
Existing files will be overwritten.

commands.name: encrypt
commands.description: Encrypts a file using the configured provider

options.name: --environment
options.description: The name of the environment to run the command in. Overrules the active environment set in .confixrc

arguments.name: INPUT_FILE
arguments.description: The path to the file to encrypt or decrypt.

arguments.name: OUT_FILE
arguments.description:
The file to write the encrypted or decrypted data to.
If not provided the input file will be overwritten.
Existing files will be overwritten.

commands.name: project

options.description: If you specify this option, only the components will be built.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initializes a project and creates a project file

commands.name: report
commands.description: Generates a report for the project

options.name: --environment
options.description: The name of the environment to run the command in. Overrules the active environment set in .confixrc

options.name: --output-file
options.description: The path to the report file. If not specified, the report will be written to the console.

options.name: --only-components
options.description: If you specify this option, only the components will be built.

commands.name: variable
commands.description: This command is used to manage variables.

commands.name: copy
commands.description: Copies a variable from one provider to another provider

options.name: --environment
options.description: The name of the environment to run the command in. Overrules the active environment set in .confixrc

options.name: --from
options.description: The name of the new variable

options.name: --to
options.description: The name of the new variable

options.name: --to-environment
options.description: The name of the environment you want to migrate the variable to

commands.name: get
commands.description: resolves a variable by name

options.name: --environment
options.description: The name of the environment to run the command in. Overrules the active environment set in .confixrc

commands.name: list
commands.description: list available variables

options.name: --environment
options.description: The name of the environment to run the command in. Overrules the active environment set in .confixrc

options.name: --provider
options.description: The name of the provider to resolve the variable from

commands.name: set
commands.description: sets a variable. Overrides existing value if any.

options.description: The name of the environment to run the command in. Overrules the active environment set in .confixrc
